name: obexdns
description: Protective DoH Resolver based on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate:dev && concurrently "npm run ui:dev" "wrangler dev"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run db:migrate:prod && wrangler deploy
scripts.build:pages: npm run ui:build && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=static/_worker.js --platform=neutral --format=esm --minify --external:cloudflare:*
scripts.db:migrate:prod: echo "y" | wrangler d1 migrations apply obex_db --remote
scripts.db:status: wrangler d1 execute obex_db --local --command='SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type="table"'

author: Hugo Koo
